title: wp2shell: Pre Authentication RCE in WordPress Core
excerpt: Check whether your WordPress site is affected by the pre-authentication RCE in WordPress Core. A free checker from Searchlight Cyber.
content_html:
wp2shell

Searchlight Cyber's security research team has discovered a pre-authentication RCE in WordPress Core. The attack has no preconditions and can be exploited by an anonymous user in a stock install of WordPress with no plugins.

It is estimated that over 500 million websites use WordPress. Given the severity of the bug and to give defenders time to patch, we are not releasing technical details at this time. We are, however, releasing a checker so you can determine whether your instance is vulnerable. Check your site directly below.

Versions Affected

< 6.9.0not affected
6.9.0 - 6.9.4affected, fixed in 6.9.5
7.0.0 - 7.0.1affected, fixed in 7.0.2

Mitigation

The best way to protect yourself is to update WordPress immediately. WordPress 7.0.2 contains the fix (or 6.9.5 if you are on the 6.9 branch). Until you can update, there are multiple mitigation options:

  1. Install the plugin Disable WP REST API to disable unauthenticated users from using the WordPress API. This is the easiest option but does have a possible low risk of breaking existing functionality.
  2. Use a WAF to block the path /wp-json/batch/v1 and the query parameter rest_route=/batch/v1 (both of these patterns must be blocked to secure your instance).
  3. Drop the following custom plugin into wp-content/plugins/disable-batch-api-for-unauth.php on the filesystem for your WordPress instance via SSH or FTP and enable it from Plugins in the admin panel: 
    <?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Disable Unauthenticated REST Batch API
 * Description: Requires an authenticated WordPress user for REST batch requests.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Requires at least: 5.6
 * License: GPL-2.0-or-later
 */

defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit;

/**
 * Reject anonymous requests to the core REST batch endpoint.
 *
 * @param mixed           $result  Pre-calculated dispatch result.
 * @param WP_REST_Server  $server  REST server instance.
 * @param WP_REST_Request $request Current REST request.
 * @return mixed|WP_Error
 */
function wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch( $result, $server, $request ) {
    if ( '/batch/v1' !== strtolower( untrailingslashit( $request->get_route() ) ) || is_user_logged_in() ) {
        return $result;
    }

    return new WP_Error(
        'rest_batch_authentication_required',
        'Authentication is required to use the batch API.',
        array( 'status' => 401 )
    );
}

add_filter( 'rest_pre_dispatch', 'wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch', -1000, 3 );

Note that these solutions may have impact on legitimate use of the site and should only be considered emergency temporary measures until you can update.

Credits

Discovered and authored by Adam Kues of Searchlight Cyber.

The attack has no preconditions and can be exploited by an anonymous user in a stock install of WordPress with no plugins. It is estimated that over 500 million websites use WordPress. Given the severity of the bug and to give defenders time to patch, we are not releasing technical details at this time. We are, however, releasing a checker so you can determine whether your instance is vulnerable. Check your site directly below. • Drop the following custom plugin into wp-content/plugins/disable-batch-api-for-unauth.php on the filesystem for your WordPress instance via SSH or FTP and enable it from Plugins in the admin panel: 
    <?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Disable Unauthenticated REST Batch API
 * Description: Requires an authenticated WordPress user for REST batch requests.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Requires at least: 5.6
 * License: GPL-2.0-or-later
 */

defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit;

/**
 * Reject anonymous requests to the core REST batch endpoint.
 *
 * @param mixed           $result  Pre-calculated dispatch result.
 * @param WP_REST_Server  $server  REST server instance.
 * @param WP_REST_Request $request Current REST request.
 * @return mixed|WP_Error
 */
function wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch( $result, $server, $request ) {
    if ( '/batch/v1' !== strtolower( untrailingslashit( $request->get_route() ) ) || is_user_logged_in() ) {
        return $result;
    }

    return new WP_Error(
        'rest_batch_authentication_required',
        'Authentication is required to use the batch API.',
        array( 'status' => 401 )
    );
}

add_filter( 'rest_pre_dispatch', 'wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch', -1000, 3 );

sentences.en: Drop the following custom plugin into wp-content/plugins/disable-batch-api-for-unauth.php on the filesystem for your WordPress instance via SSH or FTP and enable it from Plugins in the admin panel: <?php /** * Plugin Name: Disable Unauthenticated REST Batch API * Description: Requires an authenticated WordPress user for REST batch requests. * Version: 1.0.0 * Requires at least: 5.6 * License: GPL-2.0-or-later */ defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit; /** * Reject anonymous requests to the core REST batch endpoint. * * @param mixed $result Pre-calculated dispatch result. * @param WP_REST_Server $server REST server instance. * @param WP_REST_Request $request Current REST request. * @return mixed|WP_Error */ function wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch( $result, $server, $request ) { if ( '/batch/v1' !== strtolower( untrailingslashit( $request->get_route() ) ) || is_user_logged_in() ) { return $result; } return new WP_Error( 'rest_batch_authentication_required', 'Authentication is required to use the batch API.', array( 'status' => 401 ) ); } add_filter( 'rest_pre_dispatch', 'wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch', -1000, 3 );
sentences.zh: 通过 SSH 或 FTP 将以下自定义插件拖放到 WordPress 实例的文件系统上的 wp-content/plugins/disable-batch-api-for-unauth.php 中，并通过管理面板中的插件启用它： <?php /** * 插件名称：禁用未经身份验证的 REST 批量 API * 说明：需要经过身份验证的 WordPress 用户才能执行 REST 批量请求。 * 版本：1.0.0 * 至少需要：5.6 * 许可证：GPL-2.0 或更高版本 */ Defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ||出口; /** * 拒绝对核心 REST 批处理端点的匿名请求。 * * @param mix $result 预先计算的调度结果。 * @param WP_REST_Server $server REST 服务器实例。 * @param WP_REST_Request $request 当前 REST 请求。 * @return mix|WP_Error */ function wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch( $result, $server, $request ) { if ( '/batch/v1' !== strtolower( untrailingslashit( $request->get_route() ) ) || is_user_logged_in() ) { return $result; } return new WP_Error( 'rest_batch_authentication_required', '使用批处理 API 需要进行身份验证。', array( 'status' => 401 ) ); add_filter( 'rest_pre_dispatch', 'wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch', -1000, 3 );

blocks.html_en: Note that these solutions may have impact on legitimate use of the site and should only be considered emergency temporary measures until you can update.

sentences.en: Note that these solutions may have impact on legitimate use of the site and should only be considered emergency temporary measures until you can update.
sentences.zh: 请注意，这些解决方案可能会影响网站的合法使用，在您可以更新之前应仅将其视为紧急临时措施。

content_html_zh:
wp2shell

Searchlight Cyber​​ 的安全研究团队在 WordPress Core 中发现了一个预身份验证 RCE。 该攻击没有先决条件，可以被匿名用户在不带插件的 WordPress 常规安装中利用。

据估计，有超过 5 亿个网站使用 WordPress。 考虑到该错误的严重性并给防御者时间来修补，我们目前不会发布技术细节。 但是，我们正在发布一个检查器，以便您可以确定您的实例是否容易受到攻击。 直接在下面检查您的网站。

受影响的版本

< 6.9.0不受影响
6.9.0 - 6.9.4受影响，已在 6.9.5 中修复
7.0.0 - 7.0.1受影响，已在 7.0.2 中修复

减轻

保护自己的最佳方法是立即更新 WordPress。 WordPress 7.0.2 包含修复程序（如果您使用的是 6.9 分支，则包含 6.9.5）。 在您可以更新之前，有多种缓解选项：

  1. 安装插件禁用 WP REST API 以禁止未经身份验证的用户使用 WordPress API。 这是最简单的选项，但破坏现有功能的风险可能较低。
  2. 使用WAF阻止路径/wp-json/batch/v1和查询参数rest_route=/batch/v1（必须阻止这两种模式以保护您的实例）。
  3. 通过 SSH 或 FTP 将以下自定义插件拖放到 WordPress 实例的文件系统上的 wp-content/plugins/disable-batch-api-for-unauth.php 中，并通过管理面板中的插件启用它： <?php /** * 插件名称：禁用未经身份验证的 REST 批量 API * 说明：需要经过身份验证的 WordPress 用户才能执行 REST 批量请求。 * 版本：1.0.0 * 至少需要：5.6 * 许可证：GPL-2.0 或更高版本 */ Defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ||出口; /** * 拒绝对核心 REST 批处理端点的匿名请求。 * * @param mix $result 预先计算的调度结果。 * @param WP_REST_Server $server REST 服务器实例。 * @param WP_REST_Request $request 当前 REST 请求。 * @return mix|WP_Error */ function wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch( $result, $server, $request ) { if ( '/batch/v1' !== strtolower( untrailingslashit( $request->get_route() ) ) || is_user_logged_in() ) { return $result; } return new WP_Error( 'rest_batch_authentication_required', '使用批处理 API 需要进行身份验证。', array( 'status' => 401 ) ); add_filter( 'rest_pre_dispatch', 'wporg_require_authentication_for_rest_batch', -1000, 3 );

请注意，这些解决方案可能会影响网站的合法使用，在您可以更新之前应仅将其视为紧急临时措施。

制作人员

由 Searchlight Cyber​​ 的 Adam Kues 发现并创作。
